title: Westland Cacti & Succulent Plant Feed Concentrate, 200 ml
features: Easy measuring dozer to ensure correct application.
Balanced formula enriched with essential nutrients and trace elements.
Helps cacti and succulents plants grow healthy and strong resulting in better flowering.
description: From the manufacturer Westland Cacti & Succulent Feed Concentrate Westland Cacti & Succulent Concentrate Feed is a balanced formula enriched with the essential nutrients and trace elements that cacti & succulents need to thrive. It helps them grow healthy and strong with more disease tolerance and better flowering. Use the easy to measure doser for the best results. Key Benefits High potash fertiliser for improved flowering Encourages strong roots for healthy growth With easy squeeze measure dosing cap Westland Cacti and Succulent Feed Concentrate Why Use? Feeding your Cacti and Succulents couldn’t be couldn’t be easier. Westland Cacti and Succulent Feed Concentrate features an easy to use dosing cap that allows you to simply get the right amount of feed into the dosing chamber, without the fear of overdosing. When to Use Feed once a month in the growing season (Spring / Summer) and allow the soil to dry slightly between watering. Outside the growing season reduce watering to a minimum to encourage a period of dormancy. How to Use 1. Remove the cap 2. Hold the bottle upright and gently squeeze the bottle to fill the dosing chamber and release. The doser will remove any excess plant food, leaving a 5ml dose in the chamber. 3. Add the feed to 1 Litre of water and mix. 4. Avoid overdosing and applying to foliage. Handy Tips Keep cacti and succulents in light, airy conditions in temperatures above 5 C (40F). Place in south facing positions for maximum sunlight. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Wear appropriate protective clothing, gloves, and eye protection during application. In case of accidental exposure or ingestion, seek medical advice and show the container or label.
